title: Set up Playwright for critical frontend flow tests
description:
Configure Playwright for the @organize/web package. Write end-to-end tests for 2-3 critical user flows:
- Login flow (enter credentials, reach dashboard)
- Create a task (open form, fill fields, submit, verify on board)
- Create a calendar event (open form, fill fields, submit, verify on calendar)

Acceptance criteria:
- Playwright installed and configured
- 3 passing E2E tests for critical flows
- Test script added to package.json

Dev Lead.notes: Sarah Kim approved after test:e2e script fix.
